author: Tester <t@t.com>
body:
mvp-sync (`54caedd`) closed (2026-06-22). Three quality-tightening
child tickets shipped in a single afternoon arc:

- `1c20aa3` — 34 resolver unit tests (`reduce_to_merged` extracted as
  pure folder). Commit `527d759`.
- `004dd23` — dual-file path filter pinned as load-bearing with
  regression test. Commit `9bdc6b1`.
- `0896e4f` — `touched_by_merge` guard removed; surfaced a real
  `replay_ops` ordering divergence; fixed by sharing the resolver's
  `OpKey` via `sort_entries_lww`. Commit `a46581a`.

267 workspace tests green (was 231). Three mvp-storage / mvp-cli /
agent-ergonomics epics still above the line; mvp-sync now off the
roadmap and `multi-client` (which it blocked) becomes unblocked
for whenever it gets pulled above the line.
